PreToolUse.command: node -e "let input='';process.stdin.on('data',chunk=>input+=chunk);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const payload=JSON.parse(input||'{}');const toolName=String(payload.tool_name||'').toLowerCase();if(!/(runcommands|execute|run_in_terminal|terminal|bash|powershell)/.test(toolName)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:true}));return;}const raw=JSON.stringify(payload.tool_input||{}).toLowerCase();const blocked=[/git\s+reset\s+--hard/,/git\s+checkout\s+--/,/rm\s+-rf\b/,/remove-item\b[^\n]*-recurse[^\n]*-force/,/del\s+\/f\s+\/s\s+\/q/,/format-volume\b/];const match=blocked.find(pattern=>pattern.test(raw));if(!match){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:true}));return;}process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'ask',permissionDecisionReason:'Potentially destructive terminal command detected. Explicit human review is required before continuing.'},systemMessage:'Potentially destructive terminal command intercepted by repository guardrails.'}));}catch{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:true}));}});"
